author: lOrm
content: Phase 1 implemented in services/background.rs. Delivered: BackgroundJob trait (Send + Sync, object-safe, Arc<MemoryDb> receiver), JobScheduler (sync tick-driven, register/tick API, const fn constructors), MemoryConsolidationJob (short-term prune + archival dedup keeping newest canonical). Re-exported from services/mod.rs. 15 new tests all passing; total lib suite 1150 (baseline 1135 + 15). rustfmt clean, zero clippy errors in new code. Phase 2 (async dispatch, auto-docs, agent summarization) tracked in #991.
